zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean I Vicomte de Rohan於1324年出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓羅翰時，他的父親Vicomte Alain de Rohan-Montauban22歲，母親Jeanne de Rostrenen24歲。他於1349年與Jeanne de Léon在法國布列塔尼莫比韓吉利爾斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1403年11月20日在法國布列塔尼莫比韓吉利爾斯享年79歲，埋葬在法國布列塔尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean I Vicomte de Rohan于1324年出生在法国布列塔尼莫比韓羅翰时，他的父亲Vicomte Alain de Rohan-Montauban22岁，母亲Jeanne de Rostrenen24岁。他于1349年与Jeanne de Léon在法国布列塔尼莫比韓吉利爾斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1403年11月20日在法国布列塔尼莫比韓吉利爾斯享年79岁，埋葬在法国布列塔尼。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rohan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brigid, Kieran, Oonagh, Padraig, Siobhan.
Irish (Kerry and Cork): from Ó Ruadhacháin or Ó Robhacháin, see Rowan .
Breton and English: habitational name from Rohan in Morbihan, Brittany (France).

variants.name: Rowan
meanings: Irish: from Ó Ruadháin or Ó Ruaidhín, both meaning ‘descendant of Ruadhán’, a personal name from a diminutive of ruadh ‘red’. See also Rooney .

Irish: from Ó Ruadhacháin, ‘son of Ruadhachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of ruadh ‘red’ (also used as a placename and Anglicized as Roughan). Compare also Rogan (Ó Ruadhagáin), of which may be a variant, both it and Ó Ruadhacháin being found in Ulster and Connacht.
Irish: from Ó Robhacháin, the name of a scattered ecclesiastical family, found in Clare in the 16th and 17th centuries. The personal name was earlier Reabhachán ‘skillful, artful’.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean I Vicomte de Rohan was born in 1324, in Rohan, Morbihan, Brittany, France, his father, Vicomte Alain de Rohan-Montauban, was 22 and his mother, Jeanne de Rostrenen, was 24. He married Jeanne de Léon in 1349, in Guilliers, Morbihan, Brittany, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 20 November 1403, in Guilliers, Morbihan, Brittany, France, at the age of 79, and was buried in Brittany, France.

historicEvents.description: Ce bourg ne devient paroisse qu'en 1387 après détachement de Saint-Gonnery

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean I Vicomte de Rohan est né en 1324, à Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, son père, Vicomte Alain de Rohan-Montauban, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Rostrenen, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Léon en 1349, à Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 novembre 1403, à Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterré à Bretagne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean I Vicomte de Rohan 1324 in Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Vicomte Alain de Rohan-Montauban 22 und seine Mutter Jeanne de Rostrenen 24. Er hat 1349 in Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich Jeanne de Léon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 20. November 1403 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in Bretagne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean I Vicomte de Rohan è nato il nel 1324 nel Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Vicomte Alain de Rohan-Montauban, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne de Rostrenen, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Léon nel 1349, nel Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 novembre 1403, nel Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolto a Bretagne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean I Vicomte de Rohanが1324年にフランスブレタグンモービハンロハンで生まれた時，父Vicomte Alain de Rohan-Montaubanは22歳，母Jeanne de Rostrenenは24歳であった。1349年にフランスブレタグンモービハングイリールズでJeanne de Léonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1403年11月20日にフランスブレタグンモービハングイリールズで79歳で死去し，フランスブレタグンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean I Vicomte de Rohan(이)가 1324년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 로핸에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Vicomte Alain de Rohan-Montauban(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne de Rostrenen(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1349년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 길리어스에서 Jeanne de Léon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1403년 11월 20일 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 길리어스에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 브레타그니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean I Vicomte de Rohan nasceu em 1324, em Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Vicomte Alain de Rohan-Montauban, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Rostrenen, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Léon em 1349, em Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de novembro de 1403, em Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, com 79 anos, e foi sepultado em Bretagne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean I Vicomte de Rohan родился в 1324 г. в местности рохань, морбихань, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Vicomte Alain de Rohan-Montauban было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Rostrenen, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Léon в 1349 г. в местности гуиллиирс, морбихань, бретагн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 20 ноября 1403 г. в местности гуиллиирс, морбихань, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 79 лет и был похоронен в местности бретагн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean I Vicomte de Rohan nació en 1324, en Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Vicomte Alain de Rohan-Montauban, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Rostrenen, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Léon en 1349, en Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de noviembre de 1403, en Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultado en Bretagne, Francia.
